title: Verify, then rewind the cache
tagline: In Pie the KV cache supports mid-flight rewind. Run the model, check the answer in user code, and rewind to a checkpoint when the math is wrong. The verifier and the cache live in the same process.
question: Compute (156 * 32) + (248 * 19). Show each multiplication on its own line, then state the final sum.

naive.label: Naive
naive.sublabel: one greedy roll-out, commit and ship

events.value: Qwen3-0.6B at T=0.0 — same answer every time

pie.label: Pie
pie.sublabel: Rust verifier scans each X op Y = Z; Context::fork() rewinds the KV cache

events.value: Context::fork() rewinds KV to base (123 tokens), retry @ T=0.6
Context::fork() rewinds KV to base (123 tokens), retry @ T=0.9
Context::fork() rewinds KV to base (123 tokens), retry @ T=1.2
verifier: arithmetic claims and final answer check out

naive.value:
# one greedy roll-out, commit and ship
curl https://api.example.com/v1/responses \
  -d '{
    "model": "qwen3-0.6b",
    "input": "Compute (156 * 32) + (248 * 19). Show each step.",
    "temperature": 0.0
  }'

# No mid-flight access. If the answer is wrong, retry from
# scratch and re-prefill the entire prompt every time.
